metadata.title: The AI Collective • Hampton Roads
metadata.description: Global grassroots movement building inclusive & forward-thinking AI progress in the 757 - We are the human side of AI

metadata.title: 🧜‍♀️ The AI Collective Hampton Roads | Meetup
metadata.description: A non-profit, grassroots community uniting 70,000+ pioneers exploring the frontier of AI in major tech hubs worldwide. Through events, workshops, and community-led research.

metadata.title: 757 Developers | Meetup
metadata.description: The 757 area has a ton of great developer groups. Our goal is to promote events that don't have a good fit within another area group.

metadata.title: Norfolk Python Users Group | Meetup
metadata.description: For anyone interested in all aspects of the Python programming language. Whether you use Python professionally, as a hobbyist, or are just looking for a great language to learn.

metadata.title: 757ColorCoded Meetup | Meetup
metadata.description: Get together with people of color in technology to share your experiences in the industry, learn about new tech, and work towards enriching the local community.

name: Blacks United in Leading Technology - Hampton Roads

metadata.title: Blacks United in Leading Technology - Hampton Roads
metadata.description: Empowering Black tech professionals in Hampton Roads through networking, education, and community building.

metadata.title: Crypto Over Coffee | Meetup
metadata.description: Meet at local coffee shops around Virginia Beach, Chesapeake and Norfolk to discuss cryptocurrency and blockchain technology use cases. A community for intellectually curious crypto enthusiasts.

metadata.title: Hampton Roads .NET Users Group | Meetup
metadata.description: For anyone interested in developing with Microsoft tools and services. Whether you are a .NET developer, new or experienced, or deploying to Azure — we are the group for you.

name: Hampton Roads Amazon Web Services User Group

metadata.title: Hampton Roads Amazon Web Services User Group | Meetup
metadata.description: Interested in AWS, new to AWS, or an AWS veteran? Free meetings open to the public on the first Tuesday of every month at 6 PM.

metadata.title: Hampton Roads Azure Users Group | Meetup
metadata.description: A community of technology professionals and enthusiasts interested in Microsoft Azure, based in the Hampton Roads area.

name: Hampton Roads Cyber Security for Control Systems

metadata.title: Hampton Roads Cyber Security for Control Systems | Meetup
metadata.description: For professionals involved in Cyber Security for Control Systems including OT, ICS, SCADA, Transportation Systems, and Building Control Systems.

metadata.title: Hampton Roads Designer Collective
metadata.description: A collective for game designers, graphic designers, and creative professionals in Hampton Roads.

metadata.title: Hampton Roads Java Users Group | Meetup
metadata.description: Dedicated to the learning, discussion, and usage of the Java programming language and other JVM-based languages like Kotlin, Scala, and Clojure.

name: Hampton Roads SQL Server User Group

metadata.title: Hampton Roads SQL Server User Group | Meetup
metadata.description: Focused on Microsoft SQL Server software and related tools for all users from novices to experts.

metadata.title: Hampton Roads Unity User Group | Meetup
metadata.description: For individuals seeking more knowledge about the Unity 3D platform, sharing experiences, and learning tips and tricks to streamline productivity.

name: Information Systems Security Association ISSA Hampton Roads

metadata.title: Information Systems Security Association ISSA Hampton Roads | Meetup
metadata.description: The official ISSA group for computer security professionals in Hampton Roads. Members from both sides of the James River interested in securing digital information.

metadata.title: IxDA Hampton Roads (UX/UI Research & Design)
metadata.description: A professional community for UX/UI researchers and designers in Hampton Roads.

metadata.title: Norfolk.js | Meetup
metadata.description: Talking about, brainstorming, and building JavaScript tools and applications in Norfolk.

name: Platform Engineering and DevOps - Hampton Roads

metadata.title: Platform and DevOps Engineering - Hampton Roads | Meetup
metadata.description: For those passionate about building robust, scalable platforms. DevOps, automation, and continuous improvement in Hampton Roads.

metadata.title: The Williamsburg Software Developers Group | Meetup
metadata.description: Software professionals in Williamsburg involved in designing, developing, testing, and deploying software. All skill levels welcome.

metadata.title: Virginia Beach Bitcoin | Meetup
metadata.description: A growing grassroots bitcoin meetup meeting twice a month to discuss how bitcoin is reshaping money, finance, and economics.

metadata.title: Virginia Beach Wix Studio Community | Meetup
metadata.description: The Virginia Beach Wix Studio community. Join for face-to-face events or virtual gatherings for web designers and developers.

metadata.title: WordPress Hampton Roads | Meetup
metadata.description: An exchange of ideas, examples, support and answers regarding WordPress. Open to WordPress.org and WordPress.com users alike.
